raw_data_file: data/raw/study_29/Morling and Lee Faculty Sample Open Data.csv
model_formula: univtenure ~ Title * Department; Type-III between-subjects ANOVA (SPSS UNIANOVA SSTYPE(3)); Title main effect
contrast_direction: Associate Professor (Title=2) minus Associate Teaching Professor (Title=1)
extraction_note: Morling & Lee 2019. Correct DV is univtenure (cctenure gives F=0.24, wrong target); faculty file already filtered. F and 95% CI reproduce exactly; d=1.46 vs reported 1.50 (CI [1.25,1.67] centers on 1.46, so 1.50 is likely a paper typo). eta_p2=0.350. Wave 2: factorial ANOVA, design-matched model pending.

raw_data_file: data/raw/study_29/Morling and Lee Faculty Sample Open Data.csv
model_formula: univkids ~ Title * Department; Type-III between-subjects ANOVA (SPSS UNIANOVA SSTYPE(3)); Title main effect
contrast_direction: Associate Professor (Title=2) minus Associate Teaching Professor (Title=1)
extraction_note: Second result (rated likelihood target has children, univkids). Fully reproducible: F(1,429)=14.19, |d|=0.36 [0.17,0.55]; Associate Teaching Professors rated MORE likely to have children (signed d negative). eta_p2=0.032. Wave 2: factorial ANOVA, pending.
